laws.title: Public Law 29-211 | Amendment to the Presidential Succession Act of 1947
laws.status_basis: The live Title 3 text already contains the new 3 U.S.C. 19 subsections, and the XML note is concise with no quoted-content dump.

provisions.text_summary: Short title and severability for the Presidential Succession Amendment of 2025.
provisions.evidence: "Presidential Succession Amendment of 2025"; "This Act shall be severable"

provisions.text_summary: Amend 3 U.S.C. 19(c)(2), (d)(1), and (d)(2) by deleting the listed language and adding the Cabinet-list and vacancy exception text.
provisions.exact_change: Strike the period at the end of subsection (c)(2), delete the listed phrases in subsection (d)(1), insert "and Labor" after Commerce, and replace the remainder of subsection (d)(2) after "term" with a period.
provisions.evidence: "striking the period"; "striking from subsection (d)(1)"; "adding the phrase and Labor"
provisions.notes: The operative code text is already present in the live 3 U.S.C. 19 section.

current_implementation.detail: 3 U.S.C. 19 already contains the enacted subsections (g) and (h), and the note record is concise.

recommended_actions: Leave the integrated 3 U.S.C. 19 amendment in place.
Keep the historical note concise at /us/usc/t3/s1.

laws.title: Public Law 29-212 | Efficient Impeachment in the House Act
laws.status_basis: The act is a live statutory note that amends Public Law 28-203 sections 6 and 7; no direct Code rewrite is supplied.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, severability, and effective-date language.
provisions.evidence: "Efficient Impeachment in the House Act"; "This Act shall become effective"

provisions.text_summary: Rewrite section 6(a) of Public Law 28-203 to restate when House impeachment inquiries may be initiated.
provisions.exact_change: Section 6(a) of Public Law 28-203 shall be amended and read as the following.
provisions.evidence: "Section 6(a) of Public Law 28-203 shall be amended"
provisions.notes: Amends prior public-law text, not a positive-law Code section.

provisions.text_summary: Adjust the no-inquiry timing and the appointment of impeachment managers under Public Law 28-203.
provisions.exact_change: Section 6(b)(iii) and section 7(a) of Public Law 28-203 are amended and re-read.
provisions.evidence: "Section 6(b)(iii) of Public Law 28-203 shall be amended"; "Section 7(a) shall be amended"

current_implementation.detail: The note is concise and parked at the Title 2 anchor; the law remains note material rather than Code text.

recommended_actions: Retain the concise statutory note at /us/usc/t2/s1.
Keep the amendments to Public Law 28-203 summarized, not codified as Code text.

provisions.evidence: "D.C Delegate Elimination Act"; "This Act shall become effective"

laws.title: Public Law 29-214 | Safeguarding American Democracy and Maintaining Order in our Streets Act
laws.status_basis: The act establishes local anti-paramilitary rules and penalties and no later repeal is shown in the reviewed materials.

provisions.evidence: "Safeguarding American Democracy and Maintaining Order in our Streets Act"; "This Act shall become effective"

provisions.text_summary: Define private paramilitary activity for the act.
provisions.evidence: "PRIVATE PARAMILITARY ACTIVITY"; "shall be defined as"
provisions.notes: No Code section is directly amended.

provisions.text_summary: Ban unauthorized private paramilitary activity, list the prohibited conduct, and set a criminal penalty with exemptions.
provisions.evidence: "shall be prohibited"; "shall be imprisoned for no more than ten (10) days"
provisions.notes: General law preserved as a note at the closest subject-matter anchor.

recommended_actions: Retain the act as a concise statutory note at /us/usc/t50/s1.

laws.title: Public Law 29-215 | Stability in the Presidency Act
laws.status_basis: The live Title 3 text already contains the added subsections (g) and (h) in 3 U.S.C. 19, but the note still carries a quoted-content dump.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, constitutional authority, and standing provisions.
provisions.evidence: "Stability in the Presidency Act"; "This Act is enacted pursuant"

provisions.text_summary: Congressional findings about presidential incapacity and the need for a new acting-president procedure.
provisions.evidence: "Congress makes the following findings"; "It is in the national interest"

provisions.text_summary: Insert new subsections (g) and (h) into 3 U.S.C. 19 to create incapacity procedures for an Acting President.
provisions.exact_change: Add new subsections (g) and (h) after subsection (f) in 3 U.S.C. 19.
provisions.evidence: "3 U.S.C. 19 is amended by inserting the following after subsection (f)"

provisions.text_summary: Require a declaration of incapacity, congressional review, and limited judicial review.
provisions.exact_change: Create the declaration, appeal, congressional determination, and judicial review mechanics inside the amended section.
provisions.evidence: "written declaration of incapacity"; "Congress shall convene within forty-eight hours"

provisions.text_summary: Severability clause.
provisions.evidence: "If any provision of this Act"; "shall not be affected"

current_implementation.detail: The operative 3 U.S.C. 19 amendment is present, but the note still includes quotedContent boilerplate.

recommended_actions: Keep the integrated 3 U.S.C. 19 amendment in place.
Trim the note to concise history and remove the quotedContent dump.

laws.title: Public Law 29-216 | District of Columbia Home Rule Act of 2025
laws.status_basis: The archive treats this local act as repealed or superseded, so it belongs in historical-only form.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, purpose, and definitions for the District of Columbia municipal government framework.
provisions.evidence: "District of Columbia Home Rule Act of 2025"; "For the purposes of this Act"
provisions.notes: Local-government framework; keep as history only after repeal.

provisions.text_summary: Establish the charter preamble, legislative power, and charter-amendment procedure.
provisions.evidence: "shall establish the means of governance"; "may be amended by an act passed by the Council"

provisions.text_summary: Create the Council and set membership, qualifications, powers, chairmanship, quorum, and investigations.
provisions.evidence: "There is established a Council"; "the power to investigate any matter"

provisions.text_summary: Set the Mayor election, vacancy rules, and executive powers and duties.
provisions.evidence: "There is established the Office of Mayor"; "The executive power of the District shall be vested in the Mayor"

provisions.ref: TITLE III / SEC. 331 and PART D / SEC. 341-343
provisions.text_summary: Define judicial power and the citizens bill of rights on public records, voice, and notice.
provisions.evidence: "judicial power of the District"; "Each citizen of the District shall have the right"

provisions.text_summary: Reserve congressional authority, limit the Council, create a Joint Committee, and preserve Congress removal authority.
provisions.evidence: "reserves the right"; "There shall be a Joint Committee"

provisions.text_summary: Referendum, transfer of authority, emergency control, open meetings, construction, severability, and effective date.
provisions.evidence: "shall conduct a public referendum"; "shall be placed under the jurisdiction"; "shall prevail and shall be deemed to supersede"
provisions.notes: Later-law repeal makes the whole act historical only.

current_implementation.detail: The historical-note posture is correct after repeal, but the note still embeds the full quoted enactment.

recommended_actions: Retain only a concise historical note at /us/usc/t40/s101/4.
Remove the quotedContent dump and archive-link boilerplate.
